content: BirdEye (birdeye.so) - Solana analytics. Token prices, OHLCV, security, wallets, market cap, liquidity. Free ~100 req/min. API key at birdeye.so Developer section. Set BIRDEYE_API_KEY on Railway. Scanner works WITHOUT it in paper mode.

All 28 strategies optimized: 6 bugs fixed, signal strength added, registry defaults overhauled. Top Sharpe: funding_arb(1.5-2.5), sma_adx_bb_vol(1.0-1.5), mean_reversion(1.0-1.5). Solana scanner fully integrated with 12 endpoints.

Backend: Railway auto-deploy from jdgafx/open-algotrade-api main. Frontend: Netlify auto-deploy from jdgafx/hyperliquid-trading-saas main. CORS fixed, Dockerfile fixed for hmmlearn, Solana router mounted, Prisma DATABASE_URL set.
